h72ec1667gd2e5g4dbbgb068g19c8768a269a: The pig's dead, my friend. Staring at it won't bring it back.
h1d585568ga012g423fgb2a5gb53c6a45da25: Come on. We'll never fix these brainworms if we stop and gawk at every piece of carrion you find.
hbcdb1aceg7770g4e04ga5c1g8d45eebee12b: *The boar seems to be fresh - only a few hours dead. Examining the corpse, you see two small puncture wounds in its neck.*
h3c21921dg2d09g4258g813cg4a9fe2acf575: And? Is it dead enough for you?
h09e64ca3g372ag45f1g8c78g71097a147f4c: These marks are strange. Do you recognise them?
he5780df9gfc7eg4f20gb9acg1cd5c7143797: I - it's been drained of blood with wounds in its neck. It's been killed by a vampire.
hc69c9e17gfb64g4eeeg89d2g705b0c579a37: I didn't want to say anything because I didn't want to worry you. They're ferocious creatures.
hbe515f43g6fc8g4e42gb2a5gd380d6892595: But don't worry, I'll keep watch tonight. We won't have to worry about nocturnal visitors. Now please, let's go.
h8fa3a9e4g8754g4f7cg8d1dgd6bf5607bd44: Yes. I know it's a waste of our time and I'm done indulging you.
hf120b9b0g398bg4b1dgbd18g047f3c986358: You know something about this, don't you?
h9bbce47bge2a4g4ce9ga940g854400bf61d9: *The boar seems to be fresh - only a few hours dead - but you can't find any sign of a wound.*
hb314f852g49b4g4cf9g98c7g2c418b2abc22: See? Nothing. Come on, we're wasting our time.
hfbe93fc4g2affg4e72g8a92g5245544beab5: I can't leave my kills lying around like this.
h982b3bfeg3b0eg4749gb4d7gee3e99c68c8c: It's not every day you find a pig drained of blood. People will start asking questions.
